Waypoint.name: Waypt1
Waypoint.Question: Why must I linger here?
Waypoint.Response: I suppose it's because we're still trying to figure things out. We haven't quite reached a point where we can move on or make any sense of what's happening. The silence is... comfortable, in a way. It's as if the only sound that matters is the one inside our own heads.

Waypoint.name: Waypt2
Waypoint.Statement: Why do the birds keep on singing?
